publishedAbstract: * `noobaa-endpoint` keeps starting and ending at `CrashLoopBackOff` state after upgrading the OCS cluster. * `OCS` cluster is upgraded to the next version, but the `Ceph` cluster is not upgraded. * `ocs-operator` fails to reconcile the cluster due to `StorageClassName` set to `null` in `StorageClassDeviceSet`.
publishedTitle: Ocs-operator pod fails to reconcile the cluster due to StorageClassName set to null
